title: Smart RGB LED Light Bulbs (4-Pack)
description: WiFi-enabled smart LED bulbs with 16 million colors. Works with Alexa and Google Home. Schedule, dim, and change colors via app or voice. Energy efficient, 9W equivalent to 60W.

title: Indoor Smart Security Camera - White
description: 1080p HD indoor security camera with night vision, two-way audio, motion detection, and cloud storage. Works with Alexa. Monitor your home from anywhere via smartphone app.

title: Smart Video Doorbell with Camera
description: Wireless video doorbell with 2K HD camera, motion detection, two-way talk, and night vision. Real-time alerts on your phone. Easy DIY installation, rechargeable battery.

title: Smart Thermostat with Learning Technology
description: Intelligent thermostat that learns your schedule and preferences. Round display, WiFi connected, works with Alexa. Saves up to 23% on energy bills. Easy installation.

title: Robot Vacuum Cleaner with Smart Mapping
description: Intelligent robot vacuum with LiDAR mapping, 2700Pa suction, auto-empty dock, and app control. Works with Alexa. Cleans carpets and hard floors. 150-minute runtime.

title: Smart WiFi Plug Set (4-Pack)
description: Compact smart plugs with WiFi connectivity. Control any device remotely via app or voice with Alexa/Google Home. Set schedules, timers, and monitor energy usage.

title: Smart Door Lock with Fingerprint & Keypad
description: Advanced smart door lock with fingerprint scanner, keypad, key card, and app access. Auto-lock, temporary codes for guests, and activity log. Works with Alexa. Easy retrofit installation.

title: Smart Home Hub Controller
description: Central smart home hub with touchscreen display. Controls all your smart devices from one place — lights, locks, cameras, thermostats. Zigbee, Z-Wave, and WiFi compatible.
